svg.text: FastAPI + React · 3-state rule engine · background AI · polling

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What pages does the React frontend need?')
g.text: Login · Apply Leave · My Leaves (polls every 2s if PROCESSING) · Admin Panel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is FastAPI structured with routers and Depends?')
sendPrompt('Show the full leaves router code with BackgroundTasks')
sendPrompt('Show the admin router with override endpoint')
sendPrompt('What does the dashboard endpoint return?')

g.text: Rule 2: balance < days → REJECTED · Rule 3: clash → REJECTED

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does FastAPI BackgroundTasks work for the AI call?')
sendPrompt('Show the process_leave_ai background function code')
g.text: Anthropic SDK → APPROVED / REJECTED → writes to DB

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the 6 DB tables with the PROCESSING status added?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis cache in this system?')

svg.text: Frontend polling: if status === PROCESSING → GET /api/leaves/:id every 2s until APPROVED or REJECTED
Admin override: PUT /api/admin/leaves/:id/override → writes decided_by = ADMIN
BTech CSE Project — 3-state engine · no DB triggers
